title: EMM 配置
completionRule: Complete only after the delegated legacy EMM config component is fully frozen and characterized, canonical [nodes.neoview.emm] persistence covers database/setting/translation paths and enable state, connection validation and live reconfiguration have explicit behavior, and desktop plus constrained Card evidence passes.

unsupportedNodes.replacement: The wrapper prototype freezes only delegation; the XR Card currently restores the verified path and enable controls while the delegated legacy inventory remains partial.

sourceUiInventory.title: EMM 数据源路径
acceptanceItems: 启用或禁用外部 EMM 数据源
配置一个或多个 database.sqlite 路径
配置 setting.json 与标签翻译字典路径
恢复 APPDATA 自动发现

sourceUiInventory.title: 加载、保存、失败与重启状态
acceptanceItems: 路径变更明确提示后端重启边界

sourceUiInventory.title: 连接与兼容性验证
acceptanceItems: 测试数据库存在与 Mangas schema 兼容性
显示实际命中来源和只读状态
路径切换后重新组合当前 Reader EMM store

items.title: 规范化 EMM 路径配置与 TOML 持久化
items.targetContract: Persist enabled, bounded database paths, optional setting.json, translations.db and db.text.json paths plus default rating in [nodes.neoview.emm], retaining portable/APPDATA/LOCALAPPDATA auto-discovery for both database.sqlite and legacy db.sqlite when paths are empty and never writing Reader business tables to xiranite.db.
items.notes: The authenticated config route validates and serializes the complete EMM DTO to canonical snake_case TOML. The atomic roundtrip preserves future fields under [nodes.neoview.emm]. The external database remains a read-only foreign source; empty database_paths means automatic discovery under portable, APPDATA and LOCALAPPDATA. translations.db is persisted for legacy compatibility but is not yet consumed by the Reader projection.

items.title: 加载、保存、恢复默认和失败反馈
items.targetContract: Load once when active, disable duplicate writes, keep the draft after failure, expose alert/status feedback and restore the canonical automatic-discovery defaults.
items.notes: Successful path changes are honest about requiring Reader backend restart until live store replacement is implemented. Failed HTTP persistence reports an alert while retaining the user's draft; restore-default uses the same serialized endpoint.

items.title: 连接测试与运行时数据源切换
items.targetContract: Validate file existence and Mangas compatibility through a bounded backend probe, then atomically replace the current read-only EMM composition without exposing SQLite to React or leaking old handles.
items.notes: The current Card persists valid configuration and documents restart semantics; it does not claim live connection testing.

items.title: 隐藏零请求与取消迟到配置加载
items.targetContract: Perform no request while hidden, abort config loading on deactivation or unmount and keep persistence writes serialized by the shared config endpoint.
items.notes: Hidden Cards issue no request, deactivation aborts an active load, and the authenticated backend queue serializes concurrent writes. No polling, filesystem access or SQLite work is added to the browser.
